title: philydraceae
intro: The Philydraceae rank is a family of flowering plants. It is a group of plants that are typically found in tropical and subtropical regions, and are characterized by their unique, often cup-shaped flowers. The Philydraceae family includes around 15 species of plants, which are generally small to medium-sized shrubs or vines. These plants are often found in aquatic or humid environments, and are known for their attractive, showy blooms.
